name: io.github.sakuracianna/agentic-sdlc-mcp
title: Agentic SDLC MCP
description: Agentic SDLC governance and security controls for AI coding agents working with GitHub.

environmentVariables.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: GitHub token with the least privileges required by the tools you call.

environmentVariables.name: GITHUB_OWNER
environmentVariables.description: Optional default GitHub organization or user name.

environmentVariables.name: SDLC_DEFAULT_BRANCH
environmentVariables.description: Optional default branch used when repository metadata is unavailable.
